description:
## Deep Component Audit ‚Äî hx-grid

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-grid/`
**Sub-components:** hx-grid-item

### wc-mcp Tools ‚Äî USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Gap, column count, breakpoints. Responsive.
2. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. Semantic grid (not table). Content reflow at zoom. Reading order.
3. **Functionality** ‚Äî Column count. Responsive breakpoints. Grid gap. Item spanning (col-span, row-span). Auto-flow. Alignment.
4. **TypeScript** ‚Äî Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** ‚Äî Shadow DOM. CSS Grid. Responsive. CSS Parts. Container queries.
6. **CEM Accuracy** ‚Äî Both grid + grid-item documented.
7. **Tests** ‚Äî 80%+ coverage. Columns. Responsive. Spanning. Alignment.
8. **Storybook** ‚Äî Various columns. Responsive demo. Spanning. Nested.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** ‚Äî Layout builder. Views grid. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** ‚Äî CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-grid
